items.title: Written practice
items.body:
Translate the workbook prompts into English. Use the patterns you studied.

Examples:
• Você fala Inglês? / Eu falo inglês com o professor.
• Você gosta de comer pão com presunto no café da manhã?
• Não tomo chá à noite, mas tomo de manhã.
• Você estuda com seu amigo na escola?
• Você trabalha com seu filho? / Eu trabalho em casa.

items.prompt: No, I don’t speak Portuguese. I speak English.
items.answer: Do you speak Portuguese at home?

items.prompt: No, I don’t work in the morning. I work at night.
items.answer: Do you work in the morning?

items.prompt: 3. Do you drink coffee or milk for breakfast? / juice – coffee / juice milk.
items.answer: 2. Do you like to sleep in the morning? In the afternoon / in the evening.

items.prompt: 9. Do you study English or Portuguese at school? / French – Portuguese
items.answer: 8. Do you eat bread and cheese at school? cheese ham / bread ham.

items.prompt: 12. Do you eat cheese or ham for breakfast? cheese – bread / ham -bread
items.answer: 11. Do you study your English lessons alone? / French / Portuguese

items.text: Do you speak Portuguese at home?
Do you work in the morning?
